0xAAAAAAAA # maps to set 0 in both le: 0xBBBBBBBB   # maps to set 0 in both levels
0xCCCCCCCC   # maps to set 0 in both levels; (0xAAAAAAAA) will be replaced in both levels
0xDDDDDDDD   # maps to set 0 in L1 but set 2 in L2 -> 0xCCCCCCCC still in L2
0xEEEEEEEE   # line already exists in both levels
